arguments.argument: if ringColl>0 { draw_set_alpha(1) draw_set_font(fnt_HUDnum) draw_set_halign(fa_left) draw_sprite_ext(sReachRingRed,0,view_xview[0]+400,view_yview[0]+18,0.4,0.4,0,c_white,1) textDropShadow(string(ringColl) +string("/") +string(ringMax),view_xview[0]+410,view_yview[0]+9,c_white,c_black,1) }
